---
title: "Statistical tests"
code-line-numbers: false
---

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" width="780" height="500" src="slides/tests.html"></iframe>
```

[Slides in full screen](slides/tests.html){target="_blank"} &nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; <a href="slides/tests.pdf" download>Download PDF slides</a>

# Task

Go to the [task page](tasks/tests.qmd) for the exercises.

## Further reading

- [ANOVA as a linear model](https://stats.libretexts.org/Bookshelves/Applied_Statistics/Book%3A_Learning_Statistics_with_R_-_A_tutorial_for_Psychology_Students_and_other_Beginners_(Navarro)/16%3A_Factorial_ANOVA/16.06%3A_ANOVA_As_a_Linear_Model): explanation of why an ANOVA is also a linear model
